meaning: n.饵,诱惑物vt.以饵引诱(动物),把饵装上,欺负,折磨vi.中途休息
examples: A trap was laid, with fresh bait.
This type of trap uses no bait or other attractant.
Among the possibilities: Bait-and-switch heavy data users off the unlimited plans they signed up for.
Yet car shows at art museums are often regarded more as tourist-bait than serious curatorial projects.
